title: test(1796c): add 28 tests for internal-chat-errors.ts (8 classes, 0 prior coverage)
body:
## Summary

28 tests covering all 8 exported error classes in internal-chat-errors.ts. Zero prior coverage for all classes except ChatGroupAlreadyExistsError (which had 3 basic tests).

### Error classes covered

| Class | Tests | Fields verified |
|---|---|---|
| ConversationNotFoundError | 3 | name, message, conversationId |
| ChatGroupNotFoundError | 3 | name, message, groupId |
| ChatGroupAlreadyExistsError | 3 | name, message, conversationKey |
| InternalChatAccountNotFoundError | 4 | name, message, slug, custom message override |
| MessageNotFoundError | 3 | name, message, messageId |
| ExternalAccountNotFoundError | 4 | name, message, accountId, custom prefix |
| InternalChatError | 5 | name, code field, message, defaults, instance check |
| AttachmentNotFoundError | 3 | name, message, attachmentName |

### Key insight

InternalChatError constructor signature: `InternalChatError(code: string, message: string)` — the order is reversed from a typical error class.

All 28 tests pass.
Part of #1796 coverage expansion.
head: fix/1796c-internal-chat-errors-coverage
